description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage containing three jobs. The flake8 job runs on the python:3.6 image and executes "pip install tox" followed by "tox -e flake8". The py27 job runs on the python:2.7 image and executes "pip install tox", "pip install ansible", then "tox -e 'py27-{pytest_oldest,pytest_latest}'". The py36 job runs on the python:3.6 image and executes "pip install tox", "pip install ansible", then "tox -e 'py36-{pytest_oldest,pytest_latest}'". No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
